rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HAROLD D. THRWEATT
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reconsider
rulings.Rulings: Motion for reconsideration is untimely. Court cannot grant a motion for reconsideration after judgment has been entered. Apri v. Superior Court (1999) 76 Cal.App.4th 176. Counsel to appear re: appointment of personal representative.
